creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
When building port /usr/ports/net/phpldapadmin build-process gets terminated by an error after building port /usr/ports/lang/php5. phpldapadmin obviously needs 'phpize' which is present in working directory of php5.2.3 but never gets installed.

How-To-Repeat: build /usr/ports/net/phpldapadmin
